patch.value: GH-276: metadata check skip terminal items for planning fields

isMetadataFieldMissing must not flag missing_acceptance_criteria/missing_estimated_minutes on terminal (closed/canceled) items under core/minimal profiles; strict profile still enforces. Use statusRegistry.terminal_statuses.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Added GH-276 validate terminal-exemption coverage to tests/unit/commands/validate-command.spec.ts: 4 new tests (direct unit: 'exempts terminal items from planning-field gaps unless strict enforcement is requested' covers closed+canceled+strict-enforce+open+non-exempt-author branches of isMetadataFieldMissing; CLI: 'does not flag closed/canceled items for missing planning fields under the core profile', 'still flags closed items ... under the strict profile', 'still flags open items ... under the core profile'). Updated the now-stale pre-existing test (closed item missing estimate) -> 'reports closed close_reason gaps while exempting a closed item's planning estimate' since the fix correctly suppresses closed-item estimate under core. Also passed required 4th arg to existing confidence isMetadataFieldMissing call. Full spec: 77 passed, 0 failed.

patch.value: GH-276 fixed: planning fields (acceptance_criteria/estimated_minutes) skipped on terminal items under core/minimal; strict still enforces; 4 new validate tests + stale test corrected.
